---
pagetitle: "Above .500 | Sports forecasts & models"
---

```{=html}
<span class="kicker">Above .500</span>
<h1 class="headline">Upcoming matches</h1>
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
from importlib import import_module
from above500 import MODELS, render

for m in MODELS:
    f = import_module(f"above500.{m['module']}").forecast()
    # match-based models (e.g. World Cup) expose `upcoming` fixtures;
    # game-based models (e.g. NBA Elo) expose `games` carrying a status.
    # Each renderer returns "" when there is nothing upcoming, so models
    # with no scheduled events simply drop out.
    html = render.fixtures_table(f.get("upcoming", []), m["name"])
    html += render.games_section(f, "upcoming", m["name"],
                                 "Win probability from our ratings")
    # payload asset paths are relative to forecasts/; this page is at the
    # site root, one level up
    print(html.replace('src="../assets/', 'src="assets/'))
```
